title: Torch Placer Enchantment
description: Enchant tools with the ability to place a torch.
body:
⚠️ Development Status: Maintenance Mode 

Feature development for this mod has concluded with version 1.21.3 (NeoForge). 

As I focus on other projects (like DynamicEnchants), I will not be porting this mod to future versions of Minecraft. 

However, I am still maintaining all current and previous versions. If you encounter any bugs or issues, please report them, and I will release fixes as needed!

🕯️ Torch Placer 

Never fumble for torches in the dark again. 

📖 About the Mod 

This mod adds a unique utility enchantment that allows you to place torches directly from your tools, saving you hotbar slots and time while mining or exploring. 

⚔️ How it Works 

Once your tool is enchanted, simply Right-Click on a block to place a torch. Placing a torch consumes durability on the tool. 

Tool Compatibility & Restrictions:

*   ⛏️ Pickaxe: Can place torches on almost all blocks (except interactive blocks, farmland, or paths).
*   🪵 Axe: Can place torches on most blocks. Note: You cannot place torches on Logs unless they are stripped, OR if you are crouching.
*   🌱 Shovel: Can place torches on most blocks.
*   \* Note: You cannot place torches on Grass/Dirt unless you are crouching. ✨ Features
*   Native Enchanting: You can obtain this enchantment directly from the Enchanting Table.
*   Anvil Support: You can enchant books and apply them to tools via an Anvil.
*   Crouch Mechanics: Added the ability to crouch and place torches on Grass (Shovel) and Logs (Axe), bypassing standard restrictions.

🤝 Community & Support 

Modpacks: ✅ YES! You can use this mod in your modpack. 

Feedback: Found a bug?

*   💬 Discord: Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Rcwdr7e) and leave a message in the mod's text channel.
